title: Our New Jira Import Feature!

posts.author: ivanhong-monday.com (ivan-monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday.com users!

Exciting update for all you Jira lovers!

Transferring workflows from JIRA to monday.com and need an easy way to import your JIRA data? You can now import existing issues from JIRA and maintain a two-way sync between your monday.com <> JIRA instance!

This is now available for both Jira Cloud and Jira Server.

You can learn more about how to import your work from Jira in this article!

If you have any additional questions, please don’t hesitate to reach out to us at support@monday.com!
